repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §3 empty ExactID catalogue; eid_proximal_did_bridge_frontier_v1 is a rejected predecessor, not the same four-law atlas

published_prior_art.cite: MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 gives double-negative-control bridge identification, but not a common finite PT/BR non-nesting atlas

repo_prior_art.cite: derivative of Conjecture 1 plus definitions; no separate in-catalogue ExactID duplicate

published_prior_art.cite: MiaoGengTchetgen2018 and MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 already give proxy-bridge identification under bridge/rank conditions; this theorem repackages the zero-residual implication

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §1 panel entries concern Q1 projection/FWL objects, not NCO/NCE bridge diagnostics

published_prior_art.cite: RambachanRoth2023 studies pretrend sensitivity and ZhangZhangWangEtAl2025 studies NCO calibration; the no-S_W-classifier claim is plausible but not yet anchored by a worked same-S_W witness

structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: Verified metadata disagree with §13: MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024 title is 'A confounding bridge approach for double negative control inference on causal effects'; TchetgenParkRichardson2024 is Epidemiology 35(1):16-22; ZhangZhangWangEtAl2025 title is 'Negative control-calibrated difference-in-difference analyses...'.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The §4 result entry cites SoferRichardsonColicinoSchwartzTchetgen2016, MiaoShiLiTchetgen2024, and ZhangZhangWangEtAl2025 by bibkey only for the flagship gap; add location-level anchors, especially for ZhangZhangWangEtAl2025.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The §4 result entry uses bare RichardsonYeTchetgen2023 and TchetgenParkRichardson2024 citations for the comparator gap; flagship targeting needs section/equation/page anchors.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the open-class diagnostic frontier has no explicit same-S_W/different-BR witness or invariant check in §9, so the generic no-classifier claim is not flagship-ready.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Ω(P) is repeatedly called observable, but both δ_pt and δ_br use Δ^0_1(P)=E[Y_2(0)-Y_1|G=1), and Exhibit 9.1 computes it from c, an unobserved treated counterfactual trend.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The identification equalities follow by unfolding δ_pt=Δ^0_1-Δ_0 and δ_br=Δ^0_1-m; this is a zero-residual definition, not a nontrivial bridge-identification theorem.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: §10 gives a proof route only for the atlas; it does not route the local no-S_W-diagnostic frontier or prove any same-record/different-BR pair persists on an open class.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the 'observable Ω(P)' language with a genuinely observable diagnostic, or explicitly state Ω as a full-law/counterfactual regime label and move the observable object to a derived bridge statistic.
Add a §9 exhibit for Conjecture 2 computing two concrete laws with identical S_W(P) but different BR(P), including the full S_W table and a perturbation-radius argument.

Upgrade Theorem 1 from zero-residual algebra to a real bridge-identification statement: specify primitive bridge equations that derive E[Y_2(0)-Y_1|G=1] from observed proxy cells rather than inserting c.
Patch §13 bibliography metadata and add section/equation/page anchors for the comparator claims in the §4 result list.

recommended_next_step: Revise: fix the counterfactual/observable mismatch and add a concrete Conjecture 2 diagnostic witness; otherwise this remains a field-tier finite non-nesting note below the flagship floor.
